title: AI is Going LOCAL! Edge AI & Local Agents Explained #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof presents edge AI and local agents as a transformative trend in data-sensitive sectors like finance and healthcare. The framing emphasizes security, privacy, and computational power as key advantages of running AI locally rather than in cloud environments.
